---
format:
  revealjs:
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-visibility: hidden 
    theme: [default, title_sta691.scss]
    margin: 0.05
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    navigation-mode: vertical
    controls: false
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true 
---

```{=html}
<section class="title-slide">

  <div class="header-band">
    <div class="logo-box">
      <img src="angrau_logo.jpeg" alt="ANGRAU Logo">
    </div>
    <div class="inst-block">
      <div class="university-name">
        Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University
      </div>
      <div class="college-name">
        Agricultural College, Bapatla
      </div>
      <div class="dept-name">
        Department of Statistics and Computer Applications
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mid-content">
    <div class="course-label">
      STAT 691 DOCTORAL SEMINAR I
    </div>
    <div class="main-title">
      SYMBOLIC REGRESSION
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer-band">
    <div class="presenter-block">
      <span class="role-label">Presented by</span>
      <span class="person-name">Krupesh S</span>
      <span class="person-detail">(BAD/2025-25)</span>
      <span class="person-detail">I Ph.D.(Ag.) Agricultural Statistics</span>
    </div>
    <div class="incharge-block">
      <span class="role-label">Course In-charge</span>
      <span class="person-name">Dr. B. Ravindra Reddy</span>
      <span class="person-detail">Professor (Statistics)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>
```

# INTRODUCTION 

## What is Symbolic Regression?{style="text-align: justify;"}

**Symbolic Regression** is a type of regression analysis that:

* **Searches** the space of mathematical expressions to find a symbolic function that best fits a given dataset. 
* **Optimizes** simultaneously over the structure of the expression and the values of its parameters.
* **Operates** without assuming a fixed model class in advance.

## Modeling Approach

```{=html}
<iframe src="modeling-approach-chart.html"
        width="1280" height="620"
        style="border:none; display:block;">
</iframe>
```
